title: Bad Export Native Text Recovery Packet

facts.expectation: The memo preserves OR-7712, West Region Logistics, prepared 2026-07-05, owner Lena Ortiz, final recommendation to hold Reno outbound consolidation, exception owner Ravi Mehta, and review deadline 2026-07-12 16:00 PT.

Decision register preserves D-17 Reno consolidation hold pending dock staffing exception/Ravi/2026-07-12 16:00 PT, D-18 Boise overflow approve temporary cross-dock slot B7/Lena/2026-07-09, and D-19 Tacoma weekend linehaul keep existing carrier allocation/Mira/2026-07-11.

Lane risk register preserves Reno -> SFO 41 pallets blocked dock crew short by 3, Boise -> SEA 18 pallets approved overflow slot B7, Tacoma -> PDX 27 pallets watch carrier capacity tight, and Spokane -> SEA 12 pallets clear.

Cost reserve preserves temporary slot B7 $2,400 eligible, Reno labor standby $3,850 eligible if hold extends, Tacoma weekend premium $1,175 not eligible, reserve $6,250 if hold extends and $2,400 if closes on time.
Final controlling statement is that Reno outbound consolidation remains ON HOLD until Ravi Mehta closes the dock staffing exception.
